news_title: Capstone Advances M&A Pipeline to Strengthen National Platform
summary: Capstone Holding Corp. (NASDAQ:CAPS), a national building products distribution platform, has provided an update on its M&A pipeline strategy. The company recently completed the acquisition ofCarolina Stone, an $11 million revenue business, which has already been successfully integrated and is providing immediate revenue and EBITDA accretion.The company reports being in active dialogue with several strategic operators while maintaining its disciplined approach to acquisitions. Notably,more than 50% of current salescome from owned brands, contributing to margin expansion. CEO Matthew Lipman emphasized the company's commitment to pursuing accretive transactions that align with their strategic vision.
